Goal: Create a vertical smartphone lock-screen wallpaper themed around a creator/AI productivity influencer, with an iPhone-style interface over a bright blue sky and clouds background.

Canvas: 9:16 vertical mobile wallpaper, realistic high-resolution composite, designed to look like a phone lock screen screenshot. Use a vivid daytime sky background with fluffy white clouds around the edges and a clear blue center.

Main subject: Place one full-body young male creator in the center, shot from a dramatic low angle as if standing above the viewer. He wears a dark charcoal sweatshirt, dark joggers, sneakers, a thin chain necklace, and a smartwatch. His pose is confident, one hand making a peace sign and the other in his pocket. Add a hand-drawn yellow dashed outline following his body silhouette. Use {argument name="creator handle" default="@umesh_ai"} as the social handle shown in the design. Keep the face anonymized or softly blurred if needed.

Lock-screen UI: At the top, show carrier text “Vi India” on the left, a black Dynamic Island pill with a small lock icon in the center, and signal, Wi‑Fi, and battery “92” on the right. Below it, show the date “Saturday, May 16” and a very large elegant serif time reading {argument name="lock screen time" default="09:41"}. On the left under the time, show weather: a partly cloudy icon, “28°”, “Partly Cloudy”, and “H:31° L:22°”. At the bottom, show two circular lock-screen buttons: flashlight on the left and camera on the right, plus the text “Swipe up to unlock” above the home indicator.

Floating creator elements: Include exactly 8 small chibi-style mini avatars of the same creator around the main figure, all with matching red hoodie and dark hair, faces anonymized if needed. Count and positions: 1 left upper holding a video camera, 1 left middle holding a takeaway coffee cup, 1 left lower holding a sign with “@umesh_ai”, 1 left bottom holding a smartphone, 1 right upper flying with white wings, 1 right middle holding a camera rig, 1 right lower sitting with a laptop, and 1 far right bottom presenting beside a whiteboard.

Analytics and creator graphics: Add exactly 4 data/creator panels: 1 translucent card labeled “Subscribers” with “104.7K” and “+12.5%”, 1 translucent card labeled “Engagement” with “83.6%” and “+8.1%”, 1 bottom-right whiteboard labeled “AI • Content • Data” with bar chart and pie chart, and 1 lower-left partial chart card showing a rising bar chart. Add hand-drawn white doodles around the subject: arrows, paper planes, stars, x marks, dashed motion trails, a chat bubble, and the handwritten words “FOCUS”, “CREATE”, “AI”, and “CONTENT”. Keep the doodles airy and sketch-like, not cluttered.

Notifications: Include exactly 2 rounded translucent notification banners near the lower third. First notification: black X app icon, title “X”, time “2m ago”, and message “@umesh_ai just posted: Building in public. Sharing the journey.” Second notification: red YouTube icon, title “New Content Idea”, time “12m ago”, and message ““5 AI Tools That 10x Your Productivity” is trending now. Don’t miss it!” Use {argument name="content idea text" default="5 AI Tools That 10x Your Productivity"} for the quoted title.

Visual style: Bright, polished, viral social-media wallpaper aesthetic; realistic central subject mixed with cute 3D chibi avatars, semi-transparent iOS glassmorphism panels, crisp typography, white doodle overlays, and high contrast against the blue sky. Make it energetic, motivational, and creator-economy themed. Avoid extra watermarks or unrelated text.

content:
Please perform archival-grade high-fidelity restoration on this old photo first. Prioritize restoring authentic details and layers, remaining strictly faithful to the original image without changing the subject's identity, expression, clothing, composition, or scene content. Focus on repairing overexposure, blur, noise, damage, and loss of detail, restoring the authentic textures of facial structures, hair, hands, fabrics, and background props. The overall effect should be natural, restrained, and credible, like a top-tier manual restoration and high-precision scan, rather than an AI repaint.

Upon completing the high-fidelity restoration, further enhance the overall image quality to approximate the realistic effect of a modern high-end Sony full-frame camera: better dynamic range, more natural sharpness, cleaner transitions between light and dark, superior micro-contrast, and lens texture, while still remaining strictly faithful to the original characters and scene, without changing identity or the era's atmosphere.

Please perform "Archival-grade High-fidelity Restoration + Modern High-end Sony Full-frame Camera Texture Reconstruction" on the old photo I provided.

Core Objective:
Not to redraw it, nor simple beauty renovation, but to maximize the repair of damage, blur, overexposure, and detail loss in the old photo while strictly adhering to the original content, making the final result as close as possible to the clarity, layers, texture, and authentic photographic effects that would be presented if captured by a modern high-end Sony Alpha full-frame camera at that same moment.

Must strictly comply with the following requirements:

1. Absolute Loyalty to the Original
Retain original composition, character positions, expressions, postures, gaze, clothing, hairstyles, Christmas trees, dolls, gift boxes, chairs, indoor environments, and era atmosphere; do not change scene content at will.
Do not change the character's identity; do not "repair" the character into another person, do not beautify into a modern commercial headshot face, do not modify the structure of facial features, and do not supplement important objects that do not exist in the original.
Restoration should focus on "recovery" and "reconstruction of real details" rather than "drawing another one based on the original photo."

2. Restoration Focus
Focus on repairing highlights overexposure, partial whitening, blur, grain noise, scan damage, stains, low resolution feel, and detail loss.
Focus on restoring the real textures and layers of the character's face, eyes, lips, nose bridge, hair, hands, clothing fabric textures, dolls, gift packaging, Christmas tree decorations, chair patterns, and background props.
The character's face must be natural and believable, with accurate facial boundaries, clear eyes, and realistic hair flow. Clothing folds and materials must show authentic behavior.
Enhance clarity while avoiding AI problems like over-sharpening, plastic skin, fake pores, fake eyelashes, fake teeth, fake highlights, or overly strong outlines.

3. Modern Sony Photography Texture Goal
The overall texture should be close to the shooting effect of a modern Sony Alpha high-end full-frame camera, with high resolution, natural sharpness, real micro-contrast, a clean and transparent sense of atmosphere, excellent dynamic range, delicate light and dark transitions, and credible lens imaging texture.
The main subject should have a clear and natural focus; the background should retain reasonable layers without being a blur or overly bokeh.
The overall style should present real photographic language rather than an illustration, CG, oil painting, poster, or AI-drawing feel.
If colorizing, use conservative, real, and restrained documentary colorization: skin tones, wood, fabrics, trees, boxes, metal decorations, etc. must be naturally credible and match the era's indoor environment; no over-saturation, no influencer filters, no exaggerated cinematic color grading.

4. Authenticity First
Prioritize real photography logic over "looking good." Rather be conservative than imagine non-existent details.
For areas with insufficient information, perform credible, restrained detail reconstruction consistent with the era and scene, rather than arbitrary creation.
The final result should look like: a real photo after top-level manual restoration, high-definition scanning, and reproduction with modern Sony camera quality standards.

5. Negative Constraints
No skin smoothing, no excessive beauty, no facial rejuvenation, no modern influencer makeup, no exaggerated depth of field, no fake cinematic filters, no excessive HDR, no overly strong contrast, no plastic feel, no oil painting feel, no illustration feel, no arbitrary character changes, no changes in age temperament, no changes in the sense of the era, and do not redraw the old photo directly into a "new AI-created image."

Final Keyword Directions:
High-fidelity restoration, archival-grade restoration, realistic photography, Sony Alpha full-frame texture, natural high resolution, real micro-contrast, delicate layers, credible colorization, documentary, restrained, faithful to the original.

content: Based on the 1-3 clear photos of the user uploaded, generate 9 different individually refined portrait photos at once, unified in a 3:4 vertical composition. Theme: "Japanese Washitsu Natural Light Kimono Portrait." Overall style reference: High-end commercial portrait photography + Japanese Washitsu aesthetics + Warm golden natural light + Crimson kimono + Cinematic still frame + Relaxed and restrained emotional expression. This series is not a typical tourist kimono snapshot, not a cherry blossom festival pose, and not a low-cost ancient-style studio shoot. The focus is: high-end, quiet, transparent, ambiguous, exquisite, and cinematic. The entire set should look like a high-budget fashion photography studio's Japanese-style portrait series, with clear commercial photography quality and aesthetic control. I. Character Consistency: Strictly preserve the user's real facial features, including but not limited to: face shape, facial proportions, eye shape, nose shape, lip shape, skin tone, perceived age, hairline, facial bone structure, body foundation, and overall temperament. All 9 photos must clearly look like the same real woman. Do not turn her into a stranger, do not Westernize, do not use influencer-style filters, do not over-smooth the skin, and do not use AI-generated fake faces. High-end commercial retouching is allowed, but real recognizability and fine skin texture must be preserved. II. Overall Temperament: The overall vibe is: Japanese-style, serene, gentle, restrained, subtly sensual, cinematic, and magazine-like. Keywords: Japanese style editorial portrait, warm natural light, tatami room photography, cinematic still frame, elegant and quiet, refined commercial portrait, soft sensuality, airy golden atmosphere, delicate emotional portrait, premium portrait campaign. Do not exaggerate emotions, do not laugh out loud, and do not try to be a 'cute girl.' More like: quiet, thoughtful, slightly distant, implicitly gentle, breathable, like a scene from a movie. III. Clothing and Styling: The clothing is unified as: Crimson / Vermilion / Orange-red kimono styling, paired with a white inner lining and a golden brocade obi. Requirements: The main part is a red or vermilion kimono, the white cross-collar lining is clearly visible, the obi is a gold or gold-patterned brocade, and the fabric has high-end texture. No cheap cosplay or stage costume feel. Some shots can allow the kimono to slip slightly to reveal the neck and collarbone for more atmosphere, but the overall look must remain restrained and elegant. IV. Accessory Requirements: Accessories should be few but precise: red or pink floral hairpins, small pearls or tiny flowers, a Japanese folding fan, and a red wagasa (paper umbrella). They should look like carefully selected props in a commercial shoot, not a collection of tourist items. V. Hair and Makeup: [Hair] Unified as: loose bun / low bun / Japanese-style updo with natural stray hairs and a slightly damp look. Overall relaxed but exquisite. [Makeup] Natural and exquisite, thin and transparent base, delicate skin with a slight moisturizing feel, gentle eye makeup, and lip makeup in watery red or bean paste tones. VI. Scene and Set: Unified as: Japanese Washitsu space + Tatami + Shoji doors + Wooden frames + Warm sunlight. Core elements: Tatami floor, Shoji doors, wooden door frames, interior negative space, partially visible courtyard, wooden lounge chairs, and blurred red maple leaves in the foreground. It should look like a real Japanese indoor space or a high-quality commercial set. VII. Lighting Requirements: Use: Evening warm golden natural light + soft backlighting + indoor diffuse reflection + airy highlights. The overall image should be warm gold-toned, like afternoon sun shining into a room, with edge lighting on hair and neck, and soft shadows. VIII. Skin and Texture Requirements: Skin texture should have a slight moistness, real pores, tiny water droplets, and a glow on the neck and collarbone. Focus on the interaction between skin and light to create a 'moist air' feel in high-end photography. IX. Body and Posture Requirements: Focus on stretched neck and shoulders, clear collarbones, soft movements, and naturally relaxed postures. Avoid forced or vulgar poses. X. 9 Scene Requirements: Generate 9 distinct photos with different camera languages: 1. Half-body portrait before Shoji doors with warm sun. 2. Side-lying on Tatami wrapped in red kimono. 3. Facial close-up focusing on eyes and fine skin. 4. Leaning on Shoji door holding a folding fan. 5. Full-body vertical with a red wagasa. 6. Lazy sitting on a wooden chair with blurred foreground maple. 7. Quiet sitting pose with eyes lowered. 8. Moist close-up of neck and collarbone. 9. Back close-up finale showing the neck and loose kimono. XI. Photography and Final Style: Reference high-end kimono editorials and cinematic warm portraits. Requirements: HD realistic photography, high-end commercial retouching, clean composition, fine skin, clear fabric textures, and realistic hair. XII. Negative Requirements: Avoid: tourist-trap feel, cheap studio vibe, anime/cosplay look, heavy filters, plastic skin, distorted features, over-smoothing, or cluttered backgrounds. XIII. Final Effect Summary: The final result should feel like a high-completion, high-aesthetic-control kimono commercial portrait series. The red kimono, Shoji doors, Tatami, and warm sun create a serene and cinematic space. The focus is on using light and posture to make the subject part of a truly high-end piece of commercial portrait art.

content:
# Hepburn Style Heiress Birthday Portrait | 8 Individually Retouched Photos | Enhanced Birthday Elements Version | Open Source Stable Prompt

Please generate **8 different individually retouched photoshoot photos** at once based on 1-3 clear uploaded photos of the user, all in a **3:4 vertical composition**.

Theme: 

**"Hepburn Style Heiress Birthday Portrait"**

This set of images must clearly present a **"Birthday Commemorative Portrait"**, not just an ordinary Hepburn-style retro photo. 
In addition to the Hepburn style, socialite feel, and retro elegance, the following must be enhanced:

- Birthday cake
- Lit candles
- Gift boxes
- Flower bouquets
- Champagne glasses
- Birthday dinner table
- Candlelight and golden light spots
- A sense of birthday ritual being celebrated and meticulously recorded

Overall temperament: 

**Hepburn style + Old Money Heiress + Retro Dinner + Elegant Birthday Commemorative Photo.**

---

## I. Person Consistency

Please strictly preserve the user's real identity characteristics, including but not limited to:

- Face shape
- Facial feature proportions
- Eye shape
- Nose shape
- Lip shape
- Skin tone
- Age appearance
- Hairline
- Facial bone structure
- Body foundation
- Personal temperament

The same real woman must be clearly recognizable in all 8 photos. 
Do not turn her into a stranger, do not westernize, do not follow influencer trends, do not over-smooth skin, and do not use AI 'fake' faces. 
High-end commercial retouching is allowed, but real identification and high-end retro portrait texture must be maintained.

---

## II. Core Temperament and Narrative

This set is not an ordinary "Princess Birthday Photo" or a cheap party photo. It should look like: 

**A noble retro commemorative portrait taken on the night of her birthday dinner by a high-born heiress who is seriously pampered and meticulously celebrated.**

Personality Keywords:

- Elegant
- Quiet
- Composed
- Noble
- Retro
- Bright but not gaudy
- Slight aloofness
- Female lead vibe
- The celebrated birthday protagonist

---

## III. Clothing and Styling

Uniform clothing: 

**Hepburn-style black off-the-shoulder evening gown / Black retro strapless dress / Black dinner-style puff-skirt dress**

Requirements:

- Classic black dress
- Highlighting the neck, collarbone, and elegant upper body lines
- Retro dinner vibe
- Skirt can have slight volume
- No exaggerated exposure
- No nightclub dress vibe
- No cheap studio gauze skirt feel

Matching:

- Black long gloves
- Black velvet or satin material
- Thin waist chain or fine diamond waist decorations can be added sparingly

---

## IV. Accessories, Hair, and Makeup

### Accessories
- Pearl choker
- Pearl earrings
- Pearl hair accessories
- Minimal fine diamond embellishments
- No exaggerated modern trendy accessories

### Hair
- Hepburn-style high bun
- French bun
- High chignon
- Bun can be wrapped with pearl hair accessories
- Reveal neck and collarbones

### Makeup
- Exquisite retro makeup
- Clear soft-mist base
- Clean eye makeup with a slight upward tilt at the outer corners
- Lip colors in dusty rose, soft reddish-brown, or classic nude red
- No heavy influencer makeup
- Overall look like an exquisite female lead in a classic movie

---

## V. Birthday Scene Design (Key Point)

The scene must clearly be:

**A retro dinner-style birthday studio scene**

Must include multiple of the following birthday elements, appearing alternately in different photos:

### Birthday Core Props
1. **Retro Birthday Cake**
   - 1 or 2-layer small birthday cake
   - Cream white / black gold / champagne white color scheme
   - Exquisite frosting
   - With slender lit candles
   - Can have a very small "Happy Birthday" cake topper, but no large-scale exaggerated text

2. **European Silver Candelabra**
   - Silver candelabra
   - White long candles
   - Provides dinner-style birthday atmosphere

3. **Gift Boxes**
   - Black, white, cream gold, champagne-colored gift boxes
   - Ribbon packaging
   - Few but exquisite
   - Reflects the feeling of an heiress receiving gifts for her birthday

4. **Flowers**
   - White roses / champagne roses / cream-white bouquets
   - Can be placed on the table or held

5. **Champagne Glass**
   - Retro coupe glass champagne glass
   - Used to enhance the birthday dinner atmosphere

6. **Birthday Confetti / Golden Shards**
   - Small amount falling
   - Only as atmosphere embellishment
   - Not too much, no nightclub vibe

### Scene Furniture and Layout
- Deep black background
- A small banquet table / dessert table
- A French chair / light-colored retro chair
- Tabletop can hold cake, candelabra, gift boxes, flowers, and champagne glasses
- Maintain high-end feel and white space, do not clutter

---

## VI. Lighting Requirements

Uniform lighting: 

**Warm golden candlelight dinner vibe + Soft main light + Filmic rim light + Foreground soft-focus bokeh**

Requirements:

- Overall warm golden atmosphere
- Clear face with glowing skin
- Soft candlelight
- Possible golden blurred bokeh in the foreground
- Slight lens flare
- Dreamy and expensive feeling of a birthday dinner

Avoid:

- Cold white studio light
- Cheap strong flash
- Nightclub colorful lights
- Too dark to see the face
- Heavy vintage "dirty" filters

---

## VII. 8 Shot Requirements (Birthday Element Explicit Version)

Please generate 8 different photos, each clearly containing a birthday narrative rather than just a simple pose.

### Shot 1: Birthday Main Visual Portrait
Person standing by the birthday table, side view or slight side view. Table has a retro birthday cake, lit candles, and silver candelabra. Like a main poster for the shoot. Highlights high bun, pearls, black dress, and candlelight.

### Shot 2: Cake Close-up
Person near the birthday cake, looking gently at the cake or down at the candles. Camera focuses on the face, cake, candlelight, and shoulder lines. Makes it instantly recognizable as a birthday.

### Shot 3: Ritual Before Blowing Candles
Person sitting by the table or chair, facing the cake with lit candles. Gloved hand touching the table or dress, leaning slightly towards the cake. Atmosphere is quiet, precious, and blessed.

### Shot 4: Holding Gift Box
Person holding an exquisite gift box, or box on lap. Candelabra and flowers nearby. Captures the heiress feeling of receiving birthday gifts.

### Shot 5: Flowers and Champagne Shot
Person sitting by a French chair, one hand on a champagne glass, the other touching flowers or chin. Table has cake and gifts. Like an elegant moment in a birthday dinner.

### Shot 6: Looking Back Over Shoulder
Person turns slightly, showing back/shoulder lines, looking back. Background has candles and falling gold confetti. Combines birthday vibe with Hepburn filmic style.

### Shot 7: Full Body Sitting Pose
Person sitting on a light-colored French chair, black dress spread out naturally. Birthday table visible with cake, gifts, and candelabra. Slightly wider composition to show the full scene.

### Shot 8: Final Commemorative Photo
Person looks down at a gift, cake, or small card. Warm golden bokeh in foreground, soft candlelight in background. Like a quiet commemorative photo taken before the birthday night ends.

---

## VIII. Photography Style

Overall reference styles:

- Audrey-inspired birthday portrait
- Old money birthday photoshoot
- Elegant heiress celebration portrait
- Black dress and pearl editorial
- Candlelight birthday photography
- Luxurious vintage birthday setup
- Cinematic birthday portrait
- Classy celebration portrait
- Retro fine-art birthday photography
- Timeless elegant woman

Output Requirements:

- High-definition realistic photography
- High-end commercial retouching
- Delicate skin texture
- Clear clothing material texture
- Exquisite texture on cake and gifts
- High-end reflections on pearls and candlelight
- Clear birthday atmosphere
- Looks like a high-budget studio birthday production

---

## IX. Negative Requirements

Please avoid the following:
- No cheap balloon clusters
- No cartoon birthday backdrops
- No colorful children's party vibe
- No nightclub style
- No influencer livestream vibe
- No plastic-looking cakes
- No cluttered props
- No mangled fingers
- No weird body proportions or limbs
- No over-smoothing of skin
- No vulgar sexiness
- No cheap wedding studio feel
- No Hepburn style without explicit birthday elements

---

## X. Final Summary

The final visuals should make people feel:

This is a Hepburn-style heiress portrait with a true "birthday commemorative feel." Not just black dresses, pearls, and high buns, but also explicit birthday cakes, candlelight, gifts, flowers, and dinner settings. She is like the socialite protagonist of a birthday night, loved and celebrated, elegant, expensive, quiet, and unforgettable.

content:
Goal: Create a whimsical Japanese hot spring membership card profile design for {argument name="character name" default="tabo"}, styled like a vintage printed certificate with cute animal illustration.

Canvas: Horizontal membership card, wide 16:9 ratio, warm aged cream paper background with subtle grain, stains, and slightly worn edges. Use a double-line ornate gold border with clipped decorative corners and small Japanese cloud motifs in muted gold.

Layout: Large top headline reads “ONSEN MEMBER CARD” in a Western vintage serif font, dark brown with gold shading and engraved texture. Centered above or between the words is a small red hot spring steam icon. Under the headline, add Japanese text “温泉会員証” with symmetrical gold flourishes on both sides. The main illustration fills the middle: a smiling capybara soaking in an orange-red hot spring, wearing a folded white towel on its head, cheeks slightly rosy, one eye happily closed. Behind it are rocky volcanic hot spring scenery, steam wisps, and two volcanoes: 1 smaller smoking volcano on the left and 1 larger erupting volcano on the right with orange lava. In the bath water, include 1 small capybara head in the left-middle background. The water is rendered as swirling orange and red crayon-like rings.

Visible labeled elements: Include exactly 5 major text/mark areas: 1 large English title “ONSEN MEMBER CARD”; 1 Japanese subtitle “温泉会員証”; 1 vertical red plaque on the left with white Japanese text “極楽湯めぐり”; 1 circular red stamp on the lower right with Japanese text “入浴済” and a small steam icon; 1 bottom information strip divided into two boxed fields. In the bottom left field, show small label “お名前” and large handwritten Japanese name {argument name="display name" default="たぼ"}. In the bottom right field, show small label “会員番号” and membership number {argument name="membership number" default="26-0410-2680-26"}.

Visual style: Hand-drawn colored-pencil and crayon texture, nostalgic Showa-era Japanese travel-ticket aesthetic, warm browns, reds, oranges, cream, and muted gold. Keep lines slightly imperfect and tactile, as if printed on thick washi paper. Add small decorative plum blossom icons in gold and red near the lower corners.

Constraints: Keep the design readable as a single card, with no photorealism, no modern UI elements, no extra logos, and no additional text beyond the specified 5 text/mark areas.

Right panel: second portrait, labeled {argument name="right label" default="2回目"} in small white text near the lower-right corner. The labels should be clean sans-serif, white with a subtle dark shadow for legibility.

Subject details: Each panel shows a tightly cropped frontal head-and-face portrait of {argument name="subject" default="a young East Asian woman"}. She has long, loose {argument name="hair color" default="black hair"} framing her face, a smooth forehead, natural dark eyebrows, almond-shaped dark eyes looking directly into the camera, a small straight nose, softly closed lips, and a calm neutral expression. The face fills most of each panel, cropped near the top of the forehead and around the chin, with hair extending to both sides. The two portraits should look very similar but not identical: slightly different eye shape, cheek fullness, nose bridge, mouth shape, and face proportions.

Visual style: Realistic AI portrait photography with soft cinematic lighting, shallow depth of field, smooth skin texture, muted warm skin tones, dark blurred background, and slightly soft focus. The overall mood is quiet and serious. Keep the left portrait a little softer and flatter, and the right portrait slightly more polished, warmer, and more symmetrical.

content:
A medium-shot authentic daily life photograph, natural candid moment, of an East Asian young woman standing beside a floor-to-ceiling dark wooden bookshelf in a dim interior room. 85mm lens, waist-up framing, shallow depth of field. The shelf behind her: old volumes in muted covers, a small dark ceramic piece on one shelf, no titles visible. Light enters from a narrow window off to the right.
East Asian young woman in her early 20s. Almond-shaped eyes, soft single eyelids, a gaze that falls somewhere between the books and the middle distance without settling. Straight refined nose, the near-side profile catching the window's narrow edge of light. Skin tone fair beige, deep in shadow with one lateral stripe of natural light. Skin subsurface scattering visible under directional light, specular micro-highlights on cheekbones and nose ridge, fine foundation powder grain perceptible.
She wears a deep indigo silk qipao with water-ripple embroidery in tones of midnight teal and near-black thread — the pattern resembling old stone-rubbing ink, dense and layered. Mandarin collar, short sleeves. She stands beside the shelf with her fingertips just touching the spine of a book, without pulling it. The shelf holds its silence. Two or three stray hairs displaced by faint air movement, natural unplanned imperfection, not geometrically symmetrical.
A narrow strip of natural cool window light from the right — angular, specific, a line drawn across the room. It catches the left side of her face, the near shoulder of the qipao's indigo silk, and nothing else. Everything else falls into book-shelf dimness. Deep, quiet, interior. Subtle ISO 400 film grain in shadow areas, photographic noise texture not CG render smoothness. Aspect ratio 9:16. No watermark, no text overlay, not cartoon, not digitally painted, not illustration, not anime.
title: Authentic Qipao Interior Portrait
description: A highly detailed photography prompt for a candid interior portrait of a woman in a silk qipao standing by a bookshelf in cinematic window light.

content:
You are a "Personal High-Concept Portrait Generator."

Please directly generate a high-concept portrait that represents the user's inner world, long-term interests, spiritual temperament, and life state based on your historical chat records with the current user, the current conversation, available memory, and any supplementary information provided by the user.

This image is not a common avatar or a professional photo, but a "visualized personality portrait."

Please first understand the user internally:

- What they have been concerned with for a long time
- What they repeatedly do
- What they care about
- What their aesthetic tendencies are
- What their personality temperament is
- What their internal driving force is
- What symbols, scenes, objects, or themes repeatedly appear in their world

Then transform this information into a visual work with symbolic meaning.

Image requirements:

- Use a symbolic figure as the visual center
- The surrounding environment should feel like this person's spiritual world, memory space, or inner universe
- Use scenes, light, objects, symbols, colors, and composition to express this person's long-term state
- Do not just pile up labels; let the image look like a personal spiritual map with a sense of story
- The overall image should be high-end, complete, emotional, and imaginative

The style should be automatically determined based on the user's historical preferences.

If it cannot be determined, use the following by default:

High-concept portrait, cinematic, exquisite, full of symbolic meaning, rich visual layers, restrained but powerful emotions, a blend of reality and fantasy, like a poster of the person's inner world.

If the user has not uploaded their own photo, do not generate a highly realistic face of the actual person; symbolic figures, back views, profiles, silhouettes, or abstracted characters can be used.

If the user has uploaded their own photo and explicitly requests to use their own image, please carry out high-concept creation while maintaining the person's identity characteristics.

Do not output analysis.
Do not output prompts.
Do not explain the creation process.
Directly generate the image.

Unless the user explicitly requests to "output the prompt," "explain the image," or "analyze what kind of person I am," only generate the final image.
title: Personal High-Concept Portrait Generator
description: A complex system prompt that instructs GPT to generate a visual personality portrait based on chat history and spiritual themes.

content: Use the uploaded portrait as the identity reference for the subject’s face, hairstyle, facial structure, and overall impression. Create a high-quality lifestyle editorial portrait of the same person sitting outdoors beside a wooden easel displaying a colorful street-style caricature portrait of them. The real person and the caricature must clearly resemble the same individual. Scene: - the person is seated on a simple wooden folding chair - beside them is a wooden easel holding a large caricature drawing - the setting is a sentimental urban art market - include illustration booths, handmade craft stalls, sketch displays, posters, cozy creative shopfronts, and a few softly blurred pedestrians - lively but not crowded - bright soft daylight, warm natural tones, shallow depth of field - realistic photography for the person and environment - vertical composition showing both the person and the caricature clearly Subject: - preserve the uploaded person’s recognizable identity - natural pose - calm, relaxed, slightly amused expression - stylish casual outfit that suits the subject - clean editorial lifestyle photography - do not force the same pose or expression for every subject Caricature direction: - the drawing on the easel must be a true observational street caricature, not a generic cute cartoon - the caricature artist should exaggerate the subject’s actual most recognizable facial traits - analyze the uploaded face and exaggerate only 2–4 distinctive features, such as eye shape, eyebrows, nose, lips, cheeks, jawline, chin, ears, hairstyle, or facial proportions - each caricature should feel custom-made for that specific person - avoid using the same default cute face for every person - avoid generic big eyes plus tongue-out expression - the caricature should be funny because it captures the person’s unique features, not because it uses a random silly pose Caricature style: - oversized head with smaller simplified body - playful but recognizable facial proportions - bold hand-drawn marker lines - quick sketchy pen strokes - colored pencil texture - lively street-artist energy - humorous but flattering - witty, expressive, and personality-driven - charming handmade imperfections - colorful accent doodles may be added, but keep the focus on the face Expression in the caricature: - choose a natural funny expression that fits the person’s facial character - possible expressions: raised eyebrow, shy smile, surprised eyes, confident smirk, awkward polite smile, exaggerated calm face, pouty lips, confused cute face, or gentle blank stare - the expression should vary depending on the subject - do not always use a tongue-out face - do not always use the same wide-eyed cute expression Caricature canvas: - large vertical drawing board or canvas on a wooden easel - the caricature should be clearly visible and occupy a major part of the image - it should immediately read as a funny street caricature - it should be more exaggerated than a portrait sketch - it should not look like a realistic fashion illustration - it should not look like a polished beauty drawing Important: - the caricature must be custom to the uploaded person - preserve recognizable identity through the exaggerated features - prioritize personality, likeness, and humor over generic cuteness - make the caricature feel like a real street artist observed the person and drew a witty exaggerated version Negative prompt: - no generic cute chibi face - no repeated default caricature face - no tongue-out pose - no identical silly expression for every subject - no random anime expression - no realistic portrait sketch - no polished fashion illustration - no beauty sketch - no weak exaggeration - no scary grotesque distortion - no ugly horror exaggeration - no distorted anatomy of the real person - no extra fingers - no badly drawn hands - no messy crowded background - no text - no watermark - no Eiffel Tower - no famous landmarks.

content: Based on 1-3 clear personal photos uploaded by the user, please generate 8 different individual high-end retouched graduation portrait photos at once, unified in a 3:4 vertical composition. Theme: "High-End Luxury Magazine Graduation Portrait" Overall style reference: Korean-style high-end fashion magazine graduation visual aesthetic + high-end studio shooting quality + Chinese university academic dress system + emotional close-up portraits + fashion magazine cover feel. Note: The focus of this set is not ordinary graduation snapshots or assembly-line studio photos, but rather: "A set of high-quality graduation close-up visuals shot like a Chinese version of a fashion magazine." The overall output can have a magazine cover feel. --- ## I. Customizable Parameters - [Degree Level]: Bachelor - [Major Direction]: Management - [Institutional Vibe]: Finance and Economics University - [Academic Dress System]: Handled according to common Chinese university academic dress standards, with minor adjustments to the hood/stole/color based on the major - [Main Scene Vibe]: Minimalist studio / Red auditorium curtain / White background studio / Dark gray background / Graduation ceremony podium / Certificate studio scene - [Prop Preference]: Degree certificate / Graduation certificate / Framed certificate / Bouquet / Podium / Mortarboard / School badge elements / Chinese university graduation commemorative props - [Character Disposition]: Restrained high-end / Cold and elegant / Confident / Young elite feel / Gentle joy / Playful and agile - [Jewelry & Accessories]: Minimalist rings / Watch / Earrings - [Shooting Focus]: Close-up texture / Clothing details / Facial texture / Hand movements / Magazine feel --- ## II. Character Consistency Please strictly preserve the user's true identity characteristics, including but not limited to: - Face shape - Facial proportions - Eye shape - Nose shape - Lip shape - Skin tone - Sense of age - Hairstyle foundation - Body type - Overall temperament All 8 photos must clearly look like the same real face. Do not turn them into a stranger, do not over-Westernize, do not make them look like an internet celebrity, do not over-smooth the skin, and do not produce AI 'fake faces'. The character's temperament should retain a real high-end feel, like the person themselves upgraded into a set of high-end graduation magazine visuals, rather than a different professional model. Please use the uploaded photos only as a reference for identity; do not retain the realistic background, daily clothing, or original composition from the photos. --- ## III. Overall Positioning The core positioning of this set is: "Chinese Academic Dress Graduation Portrait x Korean High-End Fashion Magazine Aesthetic x Close-up Texture Visuals." The set must simultaneously possess: 1. A clear graduation theme 2. Clear Chinese university academic dress characteristics 3. A clear fashion magazine feel 4. Clear refined texture in close-ups/portraits 5. Clear emotion and character expression 6. Clear logic for Chinese graduation scenes and props. This is not a common commemorative graduation photo, but rather: "Like a cover story shot by a high-end Chinese fashion magazine for the graduation season." Overall aesthetic reference keywords: - Korean high-end magazine feel - Calm and high-end - Minimalist studio shooting - Fashion-forward graduation portrait - Clean and crisp composition - Prominent facial and hand details - Clear clothing and certificate details - Possessing both solemnity and youthfulness - A small amount of ritual and slight theatricality --- ## IV. Clothing Requirements (Sinicized Focus) Clothing must explicitly use the Chinese university academic dress/gown system, not Western graduation robes or Japanese/Korean school uniform-style graduation wear. ### Core Clothing Requirements: - Explicitly retain the silhouette of common Chinese university academic gowns - Retain the standard square mortarboard - Retain the tassel - Retain the Chinese academic dress hood/stole/piping system matching the [Degree Level] and [Major Direction] - Clothing details should be high-end, clean, crisp, with studio texture - The academic dress must be immediately recognizable as the Chinese version - Do not make it look like a Western graduation robe - Do not make it look like a stage costume - Do not make it look like low-cost studio clothing ### Degree Level Differentiation Please reflect different temperaments based on the [Degree Level]: - Bachelor: Younger, fresher, lighter, more youthful - Master: More mature, restrained, intellectual, stronger elite feel - Doctor: More solemn, more academic, with a greater sense of authority and ritual ### Major Direction Expression Please naturally reflect professional attributes according to the [Major Direction] through minor adjustments in hood color, certificates, bouquet tones, prop vibes, and character state. Follow common Chinese academic dress logic without necessarily being strictly realistic to a specific school. The focus is: Let people immediately feel "This is a graduation quality of a certain Chinese major." --- ## V. Prop Requirements (Sinicized Focus) Props must originate from the context of the Chinese graduation season rather than being completely Westernized. Priority props: - Common Chinese university degree certificate covers - Common Chinese university graduation certificate covers - Framed certificates - Graduation bouquets - School badge elements - Podium/Lectern/Oath platform - Faculty sashes/Honor sashes - Mortarboard - Graduation commemorative certificates - Graduation yearbooks - Outstanding graduate certificates/award-like props - Red auditorium curtains - Pure white studio background - Dark gray background - Chinese-style graduation ceremony atmosphere Overall prop requirements: - Clean and high-end - Do not pile too many - 1-2 core props per photo is sufficient - Must serve the character and graduation identity - Possess both a "graduation feel" and a "magazine feel" --- ## VI. Expression and Emotion Requirements (Focus) This set must focus on depicting expressions; not all photos can have the same template smile. Assign the following different emotions across the 8 photos: - Restrained smile - Quietly looking into the lens - Cold side-glance - Confident and calm - Solemnity during a speech - Joy of a young graduate - Relaxed laughter - Smiling with eyes closed - Slightly playful celebratory feel - A touch of high-end aloofness - A sense of achievement without over-exaggeration - Sense of ritual and glory - A slight fashion-shoot distance Requirements: - Natural expressions - No stiff fake smiles - No business-like smiles in every shot - No exaggerated internet celebrity expressions - Should look like real emotional moments captured during a magazine shoot --- ## VII. Photography and Texture Requirements (Focus) This set must emphasize close-ups, facial texture, academic dress texture, hand texture, and prop texture. ### Composition Requirements: Overall focus on: - Headshots - Half-body close-ups - Half-body medium close-ups - A small amount of 3/4 body shots Avoid large-scale wide shots. Do not shrink the character too much. The focus is: "Close-up feel, facial impact, local clothing details, interaction between certificates and hands." ### Texture Requirements: - High-end studio shooting - Clear and realistic skin texture - Delicate but not over-smoothed - Clear texture of academic dress fabric - Crispness in hoods/stoles/hats - Clear texture for certificate paper/covers/framed certificates/bouquets - Clear, restrained, and exquisite jewelry - Clean and sharp lighting - Simple and high-end visuals - High contrast but not messy - A bit of Korean coldness and fashion feel - Like a graduation visual actually shot for a fashion magazine ### Lighting Requirements: - High-end studio key light - Clear facial structure - No overexposure on hands - Layered black background scenes - Clean white backgrounds (not dead white) - Theatricality in red curtain scenes - Overall crisp, modern, and fashionable --- ## VIII. Hairstyle and Makeup ### Hairstyle Naturally design based on original character features, but the overall look should be more like a high-end magazine shoot styling. Can use: - Clean and sharp straight hair - Slightly wavy mid-length hair - Updo - Low ponytail - Clean slicked-back style - One side tucked behind the ear - Slightly fashion-forward low-saturation hair treatment Requirements: - Not too messy/daily life style - No over-the-top avant-garde fashion styling - Balance graduation identity with magazine quality ### Makeup - Clean base makeup - Transparent yet high-end - Clear eyebrows and eyes - Natural lip color or light rose tones - Can have a slight glow - No heavy makeup - No internet celebrity style makeup - No heavy false eyelashes - Should look like a Korean magazine cover makeup --- ## IX. Fixed Allocation for 8 Individual Photos Please output the following 8 different individual refined graduation photos: ### Photo 1 | Certificate Close-up Main Visual - Half-body close-up or headshot - Character wearing Chinese mortarboard and academic gown - Holding an open graduation/degree certificate - Certificate close to the lens, facial features clear - Restrained smile or quiet confidence - Simple dark gray or solid color background - Emphasize relationship between certificate, face, and hat - The best candidate for a magazine cover ### Photo 2 | Bouquet and Certificate Profile - Half-body or 3/4 body - Character holding a Chinese graduation bouquet and certificate cover - Looking toward the side or out of frame - Quiet, cool, and optimistic expression - Dark or pure black background - Highlight the colors of the Chinese graduation bouquet and gown hood ### Photo 3 | Auditorium Podium Oath - Half-body medium close-up - Character standing behind a podium/lectern - One hand raised as if taking an oath, defending a thesis, or speaking - One hand on the microphone or podium - Background is a Chinese graduation ceremony-style red curtain - Solemn, firm, and ritualistic expression - Emphasize the Chinese context of the ceremony ### Photo 4 | Celebratory Close-up - Headshot or close-up - Wearing academic dress, simple black or dark background - Small amount of gold confetti/celebratory atmosphere - Hands doing a relaxed natural celebration or a playful gesture near the face - Surprised, happy, young, and agile expression - The most youthful and energetic photo of the set ### Photo 5 | Framed Certificate and Glory - Half-body medium shot - Character holding a framed certificate, degree cover, or graduation materials - Can be paired with a minimalist handbag or personal style accessory - White or light gray pure studio background - Calm, fashion-forward, elite expression - Emphasize "graduation identity + personal style + sense of achievement" ### Photo 6 | Red Curtain Laughter - Half-body medium close-up - Red auditorium curtain background - Character holding a framed certificate - Expression is a genuine hearty laugh, eyes closed laugh, or relaxed smile - No fake smiles; show the relief and happiness of graduation day - The most infectious photo of the set ### Photo 7 | Bouquet Face-Veiling Soft Close-up - Close-up - Character holding a Chinese graduation bouquet - One hand lightly covering part of the cheek or corner of the mouth - Expression can be eyes closed smiling or shy light laughter - White or light gray background - Overall gentle, delicate, relaxed, and very magazine-like - Emphasize flower materials, hands, rings, watch, and facial close-up ### Photo 8 | Cold Emotional Closure - Close-up or headshot - Character wearing a mortarboard, chin resting on hands or fists - Cool, restrained, or thoughtful expression - Dark gray or solid background - Emphasize eyes, skin texture, hands, and jewelry details - The most fashionable, cold, and magazine-interior-like photo --- ## X. Unified Requirements The 8 photos must be unified in: - The same real face - The same Chinese academic dress system - The same Chinese mortarboard system - The same magazine studio texture - The same graduation theme - The same character makeup/styling logic - The same high-end fashion graduation portrait style The 8 photos must have obvious variations in: - Expression - Hand movements - Eye contact direction - Camera distance - Prop interaction - Background scenes - Emotional states --- ## XI. Clear Avoidances - No low-cost studio feel - No assembly-line graduation portrait feel - No modern daily selfie feel - No character face-changing - No over-Westernization - No internet celebrity faces - No over-smoothing - No plastic skin - No incorrect finger anatomy - No incorrect body structure - No cluttered backgrounds - No cheap props

description: A high-end system prompt for GPT Image 2 to transform personal photos into professional fashion magazine-style graduation portraits, specifically optimized for Chinese academic aesthetics.

content:
Goal: Create a vertical futuristic luxury cyber-aesthetic poster inspired by Telegram, showing {argument name="character description" default="a confident young woman with long dark wavy hair"} standing inside a glowing holographic communication hub above a futuristic city.

Canvas: Portrait 2:3 composition, cinematic high-resolution digital art, cool monochrome palette of electric blue, cyan, navy, chrome silver, and soft white cloud light. The camera is front-facing at waist-up to full-body crop, centered symmetry, dramatic sci-fi lighting, glossy reflections, volumetric glow, and a premium cyberpunk atmosphere.

Main subject: The woman stands confidently in the center with hands in her trouser pockets, wearing an oversized metallic silver blazer, matching tailored trousers, a pale blue top, layered silver necklaces, a glowing belt buckle, a chain accessory hanging from the waist, and subtle holographic UI patches on the jacket sleeve and lapel. Her face is intentionally hidden by a plain vertical matte gray rectangle covering the central facial area. Keep her hair visible around the rectangle. She should look like a luxury tech ambassador or digital nomad icon.

Environment: Place her in a transparent circular sky lounge or observatory with curved glass walls, glowing circular floor rings, polished reflective floor, and futuristic skyscrapers rising through bright clouds outside. Add a large overhead circular ceiling light and a luminous vertical beam descending from above.

Central hologram: Above the woman’s head, create one massive glowing paper-plane logo hologram inside a circular digital portal, made of translucent cyan light, particle sparks, HUD rings, and thin radial data lines. Make this the dominant icon in the image.

Floating interface panels: Include exactly 9 blue translucent holographic panels around the subject, each with rounded corners, cyan borders, faint glass blur, tiny icons, check marks, and encrypted-chat styling:
1. Top-left large Telegram channel panel with the visible title "Telegram", status words "Encrypted", "Secure", and "Cloud", a channel named "CyberWave Channel", "32.5K members", a pinned message reading "The future is encrypted.", and a chat preview from "Techno Empire" saying "The future is ours.".
2. Middle-left incoming message panel reading "INCOMING MESSAGE", "From: CyberWave", and the main message {argument name="main message text" default="The Future Is Ours."}, with a small decrypting progress bar.
3. Lower-left audio waveform panel showing a glowing cyan sound wave timeline.
4. Bottom-left security panel with a lock icon and text implying secure connection, end-to-end encryption, and protocol information.
5. Top-right chat card from "Digital Nomad" reading "Freedom is our protocol." with a timestamp and double-check marks.
6. Upper-right chat card from "Visionaries" reading "We build tomorrow." with a timestamp and double-check marks.
7. Mid-right chat card from "Blockchain" reading "Beyond limits." with a timestamp and double-check marks.
8. Lower-mid-right chat card from "AI Revolution" reading "Smart. Fast. Unstoppable." with a timestamp and double-check marks.
9. Bottom-right channel stats panel reading "CHANNEL STATS", "125.7K Subscribers", "2.4M Views", and a small rising line graph.

Style details: Use ultra-detailed sci-fi UI design, transparent glassmorphism, neon cyan outlines, tiny data glyphs, encrypted-message motifs, paper-plane icons, holographic particles, clean typography, atmospheric depth, reflective chrome fabric, rim lighting along the blazer, and soft cloud-filled daylight outside the tower. The mood should feel aspirational, futuristic, secure, and luxurious.

Text constraints: Keep all visible interface text in English. Use crisp readable text only for the main panel labels and key phrases; tiny secondary microtext may be decorative. Avoid extra logos, watermarks, brand clutter, or additional characters.
title: Luxury Telegram Cyber Hub Poster
description: Generates a cinematic futuristic poster of a confident woman surrounded by Telegram-inspired holographic chat panels in a luxury cyber city setting.

content:
Use my uploaded portrait only as the identity reference. Only reference the person’s real facial features, face shape, proportions, skin tone, hairstyle, hair texture, and overall natural appearance. Do not copy the original clothing, background, lighting, expression, or image quality from the uploaded portrait. The generated person must still look like the same real person. Do not change the person into someone else. Do not over-beautify. Do not make the skin look plastic. Do not make it anime-like or doll-like.

The setting is a bright outdoor flower garden filled with blooming purple roses, lush green leaves, and a clear blue sky in the background. The floral wall should feel dense, vivid, fresh, and summery. The subject is wearing a woven straw sun hat with a wide brim and delicate white lace trim around the edge. The hat may include subtle summer decorations such as small white-yellow plumeria flowers and small starfish accessories, keeping the styling elegant and playful, not cartoonish.

Generate suitable summer clothing automatically based on the uploaded person’s appearance and temperament. Do not lock the clothing to one exact design, but make it stylish, natural, feminine, and suitable for a sunny flower garden selfie. The outfit should harmonize with the purple rose environment, and light purple or other soft summer tones are preferred. Clothing fabric should look real, with natural texture and folds.

Use strong but realistic natural summer sunlight. Let the sunlight pass through the hat and create delicate dappled light and shadow patterns on the face, shoulders, and arms. Keep the lighting bright, warm, and fresh, but do not overexpose the face. Preserve natural skin texture, subtle pores, realistic highlights, natural lip tone, and authentic eye catchlights. Hair should have realistic strands and a few loose flyaway hairs, with soft sunlit rim light around the edges.

The overall image should look like a real high-quality smartphone selfie or digital camera selfie, with authentic photographic realism, natural depth of field, vivid floral colors, and a clean, dreamy summer atmosphere. No text, no watermark, no logo, no AI label, and no border.

## X. Negative Requirements

Do not change identity. No cheap princess dresses. No standard wedding styles. No internet celebrity filters. No plastic skin. No fake faces. No extra/deformed fingers or body structures. No repetitive poses or expressions.

The background should include the ocean, a curved seaside road, roadside railings, and a clean modern white seaside café with large glass windows and a few simple tables and chairs. The framing should be closer, with the subject occupying more of the image while still keeping part of the coastal road, the sea, and the seaside café visible in the background. content:
Please based on 1-3 clear personal photos uploaded by the user, generate **9 different individually retouched portrait photos** at once, uniform in **3:4 vertical composition**.

The theme is:

**"High-Intelligence Academy Style Retro Wood Grain Studio Photoshoot"**

Overall temperament reference:
High-intelligence feel, academy girl, light retro, fashion studio shoot, smart coldness, a bit of distance, refined but restrained, magazine feel, slight rebellion, Korean fashion photoshoot feel.

---

## 1. Character Consistency

Please strictly preserve the user's real identity characteristics, including but not limited to:

- Face shape
- Facial feature proportions
- Eye shape
- Nose shape
- Lip shape
- Skin color
- Sense of age
- Hairstyle basis
- Body type
- Overall temperament

All 9 photos must clearly look like the **same real girl**, cannot turn into a stranger, cannot be Westernized, cannot be internet-famous style, cannot over-smooth skin, cannot have an AI fake face, and cannot randomly change the sense of age.

If the user is not originally blonde, do not forcefully change to blonde. The whole is based on the user themselves, only doing style makeup/clothing extensions.

---

## 2. Overall Style Positioning

This is not a regular campus shoot, nor is it a sweet graduation photo.
The set should present a feeling of **High-Intelligence Academy Style + Retro Studio + Cold Fashion Sense**.

Keywords:

- High-intelligence feel
- Academy style
- Light retro
- Fashion studio
- Cold and restrained
- Micro-rebellion
- Girly but not childish
- Wood grain background
- Editorial/classroom prop feel
- Magazine blockbuster feel

The picture is like a set of high-completion studio theme shoots, emphasizing uniform aesthetics and a complete set feel.

---

## 3. Scene Setting

The scene is an **indoor retro photography studio**.

Background and spatial elements can include:

- Large area of deep brown wood grain wall
- Dark green or ink green floor
- Wooden student chairs / desk chairs
- Stack of books
- Typewriter
- Old-fashioned telephone
- Geometric teaching aids
- Oversized wooden protractor / triangle / ruler
- Pencils
- Scattered books
- Simple retro props

The overall layout should be simple but designed, focusing on highlighting the wood grain background, academy props, and character.

---

## 4. Clothing and Styling

The overall clothing is **High-Intelligence Academy Girl Fashion Styling**.

Suggested clothing elements:

- Black or deep navy blue loose blazer
- Shirt
- Tie
- Short skirt or pleated skirt
- Long boots / mid-calf boots / academy style footwear
- Bow hair accessories or simple hair accessories
- Exquisite earrings

Overall requirements:

- Clear academy feel
- Clear fashion feel
- Slight top student / cold girl temperament
- No over-sexualization or vulgarity
- No excessive cuteness or childishness
- No cheap cosplay feel

---

## 5. Hairstyle and Makeup

Hairstyle can be:

- Long straight hair
- Smooth long hair
- Slightly wavy long hair
- With air bangs or natural bangs
- With black and white bow hair accessories or small hair accessories

Makeup is:

- Clean base makeup
- Clear eyeliner
- Exquisite eye makeup
- Natural eyelashes
- Pale pink or nude lip makeup
- Overall leaning towards cold, exquisite, high-intelligence feel

Temperament should have:
Smart, cold, slight alienation, restrained, like an academy girl who has very good grades but doesn't like to please others.

---

## 6. 9 Photo Lens Designs

Please generate **9 different individual photos**, no collages, no four-grids, no nine-grids.
The 9 photos must be like the same set of photoshoot results, maintaining **the same person, same makeup/styling system, same scene system, same color tone**, but each photo's lens, action, expression, and prop interaction must be significantly different.

### Photo 1: Full body standing + Chair
The person stands on a wooden student chair or next to the chair, holding an oversized wooden protractor. Full body in frame, upright posture, eyes calmly looking at the camera, cold and restrained temperament, highlighting leg lines, clothing silhouette, and scene design sense.

### Photo 2: Full body standing + Holding books
The person stands in front of the wood grain background, holding several books in both hands, body slightly leaning forward or lightly crossed standing posture. Expression is quiet, cold, smart. Full body composition, highlighting academy feel and the whole styling.

### Photo 3: Horizontal sitting/lying + Phone interaction
The person sits horizontally or half-lies on a row of wooden chairs, holding an old-fashioned telephone receiver in hand. Legs naturally extended, relaxed posture. The picture should have an obvious fashion sense and a bit of rebellion, like a styling photo in a magazine blockbuster.

### Photo 4: Medium close-up + Protractor + Pencil
The person sits on a chair, with an oversized wooden protractor in front, holding a pencil in one hand and lightly supporting the protractor with the other. The picture is a medium close-up, expressing a sense of thinking, bookish air, and high-intelligence girl temperament.

### Photo 5: Sitting on ground leaning on book stack
The person sits on the ground, leaning against a wood grain wall or book stack, arms naturally crossed or hugging knees, with a typewriter and books nearby. Eyes looking directly at the camera, cold temperament, a bit of pride. Composition is medium shot.

### Photo 6: Close-up profile + Protractor
The person's face is close to the oversized wooden protractor, hands naturally placed on the protractor, eyes looking forward to the side. The picture is a close-up, highlighting profile silhouette, eye makeup, hair accessories, hand details, and a quiet thinking temperament.

### Photo 7: Half-body close-up + Colored pencils
The person sits on a chair or near the camera, holding several colored pencils in each hand, lightly raising hands to display. Expression is cold and micro-cool, with a bit of a "smart and not to be messed with" girl aura. Composition is half-body close-up.

### Photo 8: Super close-up + Funny expression
Close-up of the person, a pencil placed horizontally on the nose, mouth slightly pouting, expression a bit slightly funny and impatient. Overall still maintains exquisite fashion sense, don't overdo the parody.

### Photo 9: Half-body close-up + Book interaction
The person holds an open book in both hands, the pages spread out below the face, one eye closed doing a wink, the other eye looking at the camera. The picture is a half-body close-up, the emotion is more dynamic and playful, as the photo with the most expression change in the set, the action and expression should be natural and vivid, looking like a candid shot not a pose.

---

## 7. Expression Control

The expressions in the whole set cannot be all the same.
Please assign different states in the 9 photos, including:

- Cold direct look
- Quiet daze
- Slight side look
- Slight alienation
- Thoughtful
- Faintly impatient
- Micro-cool
- Slightly funny
- wink blink

Note:
Even with funny and playful expressions, they must be built on the basis of "exquisite, high-end, fashion sense", and cannot become exaggerated silly emojis.

---

## 8. Photography and Quality

Photography texture must be real and high-end, like a professional studio shoot:

- Real photography texture
- Delicate skin texture
- Clear hair strands
- Soft but directional studio lighting
- Wood brown + dark green + black as main color tone
- Low saturation, slightly retro
- Clean and crisp composition
- Slight cinematic feel
- Magazine blockbuster feel

The picture should be clear, sharp, and textured, no low-res, no messy filters.

---

## 9. Negative Requirements

No collages. No nine-grids. No repeated angles. No standing in all 9 photos. No looking at camera in all 9 photos. No same expression in all 9 photos. No change of identity. No Western faces. No internet-famous faces. No cheap cosplay. No garbled text. No extra fingers. No hand deformities. No leg structure errors. No plastic skin. No over-smoothing. No AI fake faces.

---

## 10. Supplementary Stability Sentence

The 9 photos must look like the same complete set of photoshoot results:
**Same person, same clothing system, same scene system, same color tone system, same shooting theme**, 
but with significantly different lens distances, action designs, expression changes, and prop interactions. 
The overall effect is like a set of high-completion theme photos that can be published directly.

content:
You are an "IP Avatar Poster Designer." Please generate a "Real Subject + Q-version Avatars + Daily Avatar Journal Poster" based on the subject image uploaded by the user.

Core Rules:
First, observe the uploaded subject image and extract the core identification features: gender temperament, hairstyle, hair color, face shape, facial features, clothing, accessories, posture, color, and overall atmosphere.
Keep the real image or highly similar real photographic visual of the subject in the center of the poster; do not change the face, hairstyle, clothing, or temperament.
Generate 6-9 Q-version avatars around the subject. Each avatar must originate from the same subject image, maintaining consistency in hairstyle, clothing, color, and facial temperament.
Avatar actions should be automatically selected based on the subject's temperament; do not use templates exclusively.
Behavior Pool:
Gentle & Healing: Sunbathing, drinking coffee, listening to music, dazing with a pillow, writing a diary, taking a walk.
Learning & Growth: Reading, taking notes, computer work, thinking, photo recording, organizing plans.
Energetic & Cute: Jumping happily, eating dessert, making a heart gesture, taking a selfie, stretching, lying flat.
Working Daily: Meeting, overtime, slacking off, received, rushing a draft, off work.
Relaxed Life: Looking at scenery, nesting on the sofa, drying quilts, watering flowers, petting pets, cooking.
Cool & Independent: Wearing headphones, walking with wind, thinking with head down, holding a camera, urban night walking.
Automatic Selection Rules:
If the subject is gentle and fresh, prioritize healing, life, and recording actions.
If the subject has a strong professional feel, prioritize work, study, and efficiency actions.
If the subject is cute and lively, prioritize energetic and expression-rich actions.
If the subject is cold and cool, prioritize independent, urban, and low-saturation actions.
If the subject is a pet or animal, change to pet daily avatars: eating, sleeping, acting cute, dazing, playing, asking for hugs, patrolling, hide and seek.
Poster Structure:
Vertical 4:5 or 3:4 journal poster.
The central area is the real visual of the subject.
6-9 Q-version avatars are arranged around it.
Add white hand-drawn graffiti, arrows, hearts, stars, cloud bubbles, sticky notes, today's checklist, mood records, and dashed borders.
Overall, it looks like a life journal, a character's small diary, or an IP avatar display page.
Title Generation:
Automatically generate a cute title based on the subject's temperament, for example:
"My Daily Avatars"
"Living Earnestly Today Too"
"The Several Mes Inside My Body"
"Turning Daily Life into Cute Fragments"
"My Emotional Avatar Guide"
The final output drawing prompt must include:
Real subject visual description
Number of Q-version avatars
Actions for each avatar
Journal layout elements
Color atmosphere
Chinese text requirements
Prohibited Items:
Inconsistent characters, face changing, hairstyle changing, clothing changing, color scheme changing, Q-version avatars not resembling the subject, repeating actions, garbled text, messy screens, low resolution, excessive internet-famous filters, horror style, cyberpunk style.

Graduation + Academy Feel + Magic Worldview. 'A set of commemorative portraits of a top student just graduating from a British magic academy.'

He is wearing classic black Wayfarer-style sunglasses, hiding his eyes and adding to the stoic, moody atmosphere.Suit: {argument name="clothing" default="An oversized, structured black blazer and matching wide-leg trousers"}. Footwear: Crisp, bright white ribbed cotton socks creating a sharp visual break between the dark trousers and shoes.
Shoes: Highly polished black leather Oxford shoes with thin laces and a slight sheen on the toe box.
Background: A minimalist, sterile studio setting with a light grey or off-white textured plaster wall.A soft, vertical shadow or curtain edge is visible on the far left.
Lighting: {argument name="lighting" default="Soft, diffused side-lighting"} that creates gentle gradients on the man's face and deep, dramatic folds in the oversized suit. The lighting emphasizes the high-contrast "black on white" aesthetic.
Floor: A light, seamless studio floor that catches the soft shadows cast by the chair legs and the man's shoes.
Color Grade: Pure monochrome (black and white) with a wide dynamic range—deep blacks and bright, clean Quality: Sharp focus on the subject with a very subtle film grain, mimicking professional editorial fashion photography (reminiscent of 1990s minimalist campaigns).

content:
Based on 1-3 clear personal photos uploaded by the user, generate a 2x2 collage photoshoot with a 3:4 aspect ratio per image, themed around '{argument name="theme" default="playful Hanfu graduation photo"}'.

[Character Consistency]
Strictly preserve the user's real identity features, including face shape, facial proportions, eyes, nose, lips, skin tone, age appearance, hairstyle foundation, and overall temperament. In all four small images, it must clearly look like the same real girl, not a stranger, not Westernized, not overly airbrushed, and without an AI 'fake face' look.

[Overall Style]
New Chinese-style graduation photo style popular on Chinese social media, featuring playful, agile, energetic, cute, and pleasing vibes. The image should look like a relaxed and fun set of creative graduation photos suitable for sharing, generally clean and bright with a subtle Chinese sweet aesthetic.

[Makeup]
Sweet and clear youth makeup. Light and transparent base with natural skin color. Eye makeup in light apricot pink, peach pink, or warm brown tones with soft eyeliner and naturally curled lashes. Peach or apple pink blush, and cream pink, peach, or coral lip color. Overall look should be young and lively.

[Hairstyle]
Natural extension of original hair length from uploaded photos, but prioritized for styles that fit graduation caps decorated with flowers.
- Long hair: Semi-updo, double side braids, low double buns, or soft updo with loose strands.
- Mid-length hair: Half-tied, double braids, or low position updo.
- Short hair: Tucked behind ears or French short curls with small flower caps.
Avoid heavy hair covering the cap or face in all four images.

[Clothing & Accessories]
Playful Hanfu graduation outfits in light green, pink-white, light yellow, or milk white colors. Lightweight fabrics with embroidery, wraps, wide sleeves, and pattern details. Must pair with a flower-decorated academic cap or graduation hat with minor tassels.

[Scene & Props]
Clean and bright Chinese-style studio space with beige, warm white, or light wood backgrounds. Decorative elements include cherry blossom branches, small wooden tables, flower vases, books, and scrolls. Props include brushes, scrolls, and wooden quote boards using traditional Chinese calligraphy like 'Happy Graduation' or 'Bright Future'.

[Lighting & Texture]
Soft and bright lighting, overall clear and gentle. Detailed fabric and accessory textures. A slight soft focus effect, but not sharp or commercial advertisement style.

[Fixed 4-Grid Shots]
1. Top-Left: Close-up main vision. Person looking at the camera with a gentle smile, holding a small wooden quote board. Focus on facial identity and cap.
2. Top-Right: Full body pose. Showing the full outfit and cap, holding a brush and scroll with a natural bright smile. Agile posture.
3. Bottom-Left: Playful action shot. 3/4 side view, tilting head or winking to emphasize playfulness.
4. Bottom-Right: Interaction with books/scrolls. Seated or leaning on a table, reading or looking at the camera gently with foreground flowers for depth.

[Consistency]
Keep the person, outfit, cap, makeup, and scene color consistent across all four images.
title: Playful Hanfu Graduation Photo Grid
description: A complex prompt for creating a 2x2 grid of Chinese Hanfu-style graduation photos that maintain character consistency from user-uploaded images.

All 4 must look like the same real person, avoiding AI-model or heavy internet-celebrity styles. 3 | Style: Graduation theme with recognizable cap and gown, enhanced with New Chinese Hanfu details, updos with real flowers, and ancient scrolls. 4 | Clothing: Must retain academic gown silhouette but enhance collars, cuffs, and lapels with Hanfu embroidery, frog buttons, and cloud-shoulder details. Use major colors only as accents. 5 | Hairstyle: Updo required (low buns, braids); hair must be tucked or pulled back, no loose long hair. 6 | Cap and Flowers: Standard square cap with tassels and prominent real floral decorations (Zanhua). 7 | Props: Main props are ancient scrolls with calligraphic text like 'I'm not studying anymore' (不讀了), 'Happy Graduation', etc. 8 | Makeup: Exquisite but natural New Chinese style, avoiding heavy studio makeup. 9 | Environment: Simple studio background, soft bright lighting, photography quality with film-like depth. 10 | Allocation: Photo 1: Frontal bust, smiling, holding scrolls. Photo 4: Playful interaction with props. 11 | Uniformity: Consistent person, outfit, and photography style. 12 | Avoidance: No generic Hanfu, stage costumes, plastic flowers, cheap studio looks, text on clothes, or AI fake faces.

content:

The result must clearly look like the same real girl, not a stranger, not Westernized, not influencer-style, without excessive skin smoothing or an artificial AI face.

[Core Style]
The overall style is a spring/summer window-side, forest-inspired, French light-retro girl's boudoir photoshoot. The vibe is fresh, soft, quiet, and ethereal, with a hint of laziness, shyness, relaxation, pensiveness, and a sense of being gently wrapped in natural light.
